missing: autoantibody panel (e.g., anti-GAD antibodies) to confirm latent autoimmune diabetes in adults (LADA)
confirmatory HEXA enzyme assay (e.g., undetectable hexosaminidase A activity) or reclassification of the HEXA variant as pathogenic
anti-ganglioside antibody results (e.g., anti-GM1, anti-GD1a) to distinguish AMAN from AMSAN
nerve conduction studies showing sural sensory sparing
histopathology result confirming focal cortical dysplasia or low-grade tumor
Genetic test for VPS13A or XK mutations, or serum CK level
Histopathological confirmation distinguishing FCD type IIa (dysplastic neurons without balloon cells) from type IIb (with balloon cells)
explicit statement that hyperactive/impulsive symptoms are absent (the prompt only describes inattention symptoms, not addressing hyperactivity/impulsivity)
temporal pattern of symptoms distinguishing persistent (Type 2) from intermittent (Type 1)
